summary.summary: Replaces the previous CoreData -> DTOs -> JSON string -> [PumpHistoryEvent] pipeline with a direct CoreData -> [PumpHistoryEvent] mapping. PumpEventStored gained native mapping helpers (toPumpHistoryEvents and per-type helpers) and OpenAPS.parsePumpHistory and downstream OpenAPSSwift entry points were changed to accept [PumpHistoryEvent] instead of JSON. A Decimal initializer Decimal(algorithmValue:) was added and uses JSON-style string conversion. The JSON-based pumpHistory parsing helper was removed from JSONBridge. Unit tests were added/updated (PumpHistoryNativeConversionTests, JSONImporterTests, CarbsNativeConversionTests) and the Xcode project/test targets were updated; a run_unit_tests.sh helper script was added. The new mapping deliberately changes handling of temp basal sub-type: an unrecognized or nil tempType is mapped to temp = nil (nullified) rather than causing a decode failure/crash. (See PR/commit and diffs.)
summary.userFacingImpact: Intended to be functionally identical for recorded pump events; the change removes an intermediate JSON round-trip and delivers native PumpHistoryEvent objects to the algorithm (OpenAPS). The only documented behavior change is more robust handling of temp basal subtypes: an unrecognized or nil tempType is nullified instead of causing a decode error (PR/commit notes this as deliberate). Tests were added to cover native mapping and decimal rounding behavior. Because this modifies the algorithm input pipeline, a human reviewer should confirm equivalence for dosing safety in deployed configurations.
